hero.title: Prepare for the Quantum Computer Threat
hero.subtitle: Protect today's crypto assets from tomorrow's quantum computers. NIST-certified quantum-resistant cryptography shields your assets from future threats.

threat.title: Why Action is Needed Now
threat.description: Quantum computers could break the cryptography (ECDSA) used in current blockchains within minutes. And attackers are already taking action today.

progress.title: Accelerating Quantum Computer Development
progress.description: Major tech companies and nations are investing heavily in quantum computing. Practical applications may arrive sooner than expected.

1.achievement: Willow: Breakthrough in error correction with 105 qubits

harvestNow.title: "Harvest Now, Decrypt Later" Attack
harvestNow.description: Attackers are collecting and storing encrypted data today. Their strategy: decrypt everything at once when quantum computers become practical.

step3.label: 3. Decrypt
step3.text: Extract private keys from stored data, steal assets

0.quote: The 'harvest now, decrypt later' attack is a real threat. Data encrypted today could be decrypted by future quantum computers.
0.author: Dr. Michele Mosca
0.title: Institute for Quantum Computing, University of Waterloo

1.quote: NIST officially released post-quantum cryptography standards (ML-DSA, ML-KEM, SLH-DSA) in 2024. Organizations should begin migration planning immediately.
1.author: NIST
1.title: National Institute of Standards and Technology

solution.title: Protect Assets with Quantum Resistance
solution.description: Quantum Shield uses post-quantum cryptographic algorithms certified by NIST (National Institute of Standards and Technology). Your assets are protected by cryptography that even future quantum computers cannot break.

nist.title: Dilithium (ML-DSA) Signatures
nist.description: A post-quantum digital signature algorithm officially standardized in 2024. The highest security standard required for use in U.S. government agencies.

dilithium.title: Quantum-Resistant Signatures
dilithium.description: Dilithium (ML-DSA) signatures provide protection that quantum computers cannot break

timelock.title: 24-Hour Timelock
timelock.description: 24-hour waiting period after unlock request. Time to detect and respond to unauthorized access

monitoring.title: 24/7 Monitoring
monitoring.description: Observer network monitors constantly. Detects suspicious operations and submits challenges

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.description: Protect your ETH from quantum computer threats in 3 steps.

0.title: Generate Quantum-Resistant Keys
0.subtitle: Wallet Authentication
0.description: After authenticating with your wallet (MetaMask, etc.), generate US government-certified quantum-resistant cryptographic keys on your device. Your private key never leaves your device.

1.title: Lock Your ETH
1.subtitle: Smart Contract Secured
1.description: Deposit your ETH into a smart contract. It's locked and can only be moved with your quantum-resistant signature. Even if your traditional private key is cracked by quantum computers, your assets remain protected.

2.title: Safely Unlock
2.subtitle: 24-Hour Monitoring → Prover Approval
2.description: When you request to unlock, a 24-hour monitoring period begins for fraud prevention. Observers watch for suspicious activity. If clear, authenticated Provers approve the unlock with quantum-resistant signatures, and your ETH is returned.

players.title: Ecosystem Players
players.description: Quantum Shield is a decentralized system where economic incentives align all participants.

user.title: User

tokenHolder.title: Token Holder

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For companies wanting to integrate Quantum Shield technology into their services. Dedicated infrastructure or technology licensing available.

tokenomics.title: Why Tokens Are Needed
tokenomics.description: Quantum Shield is a decentralized system. For Provers and Observers to voluntarily participate and maintain the system, economic incentives are required. QS tokens pay rewards to each role and align everyone's interests.

0.title: Prover Rewards
0.description: Consensus rewards for L3 node operation plus signing fees for unlock approvals, paid in QS tokens.

1.title: Observer Rewards
1.description: Pay slashing rewards to Observers who detect fraud. Incentive for 24/7 monitoring.

2.title: Governance Voting
2.description: Stake QS to earn veQS. Vote on important protocol decisions.

3.title: Fraud Prevention
3.description: Provers/Observers must stake QS. Misconduct results in slashing, creating incentive for honest behavior.

0.title: Governance Voting
0.description: Vote on protocol decisions with veQS

1.title: Staking Rewards
1.description: Earn APY based on lock duration

2.title: Fee Discounts
2.description: QS holders get unlock fee discounts
